title: THUPHA GUAH BANG HONG ZU DING HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Thupha guah bang hong zu ding hi
It na tawh hong ciam bang in;
Hong puak suk ding Topa in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hehpihna mal hong kiat tei hang,
Hong zu suk hen a tampi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tha-hat kik na a man pha;
Hong ging zuazua ding hi tam pi,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Thupha guahbang hong zu ding hi
Thathak tu-in Nong guan ding hi,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tu-ni’n hong zu ta leh maw;
Pu-lak in Pa kiang i mawh.
